text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since somebody gave me a
plushie like this.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It really brings back good memories! I feel all
warm and fuzzy inside.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch. Let's keep making people proud.
